summary: The video captures a snowy roadside scene viewed from a dashcam perspective. Snowbanks flank both sides of the road, and several trees are visible in the background. Vehicles can be seen traveling ahead along the road.

events_timeline.event: A vehicle approaches from the left side of the frame, passing closely beside the dashcam vehicle.

uncertainties: Exact speed and distance of the approaching vehicle are unclear due to limited visibility.

risk_assessment.why: Minimal risk of collision due to the vehicle passing closely but without any apparent threat.
